summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact reports no security-sensitive items and no shared canonical; close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are unavailable or unsafe for this shard. Hydrated open PRs are kept independent for maintainer review, proof, author follow-up, or ordinary PR handling. Five job candidates were not hydrated in the artifact and need live-state hydration before classification.
